notes: Reset this file whenever the [tool.mutmut] config (paths_to_mutate / tests_dir / mutate_only_covered_lines / also_copy) or the mutmut version pin in `api/pyproject.toml` changes — a baseline tied to a different mutation surface is not a fair comparison. This contract is ENFORCED at PR time by `api/scripts/check_baseline_resync.py` (T-065): a [tool.mutmut]/mutmut change without a matching edit here reds the PR, unless a commit message declares `baseline-irrelevant`. To re-baseline: run `mutmut run && mutmut export-cicd-stats`, read `killed / (total - no_tests - skipped)` from `mutants/mutmut-cicd-stats.json`, and update `baseline_kill_rate` here. See `planning/harness/scope.md` §2.5 for the rationale and `api/scripts/check_mutation_drift.py` for what the nightly workflow does with this number.
